texto: In order to justify your nonsense, you continue to fight battles won long ago. You rage against threats that exist only in your mind....You focus on the colour of schoolbags, sexist pronouns, pink toys in Kinder Surprises and the sharing of dish-washing duties in relationships. All the while completely ignoring what it is that really threatens the freedom of women....Your aversion towards the patriarchy, manifested in the form of straight white males, has led you you to become bedfellows of all the other minorities who share that aversion.
explicacao: Citação de Marion Le Pen sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In order to justify your nonsense, you continue to fight battles won long ago. You rage against t…” articula reflexao, antifeminism, antifeminist em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e antifeminist.
